requirement_topic.zh: NTP-IEC 62109 光伏逆变器安全认证
requirement_topic.zht: NTP-IEC 62109 光伏逆變器安全認證

summary.en: Peru's INACAL adopted NTP-IEC 62109-1:2024 and NTP-IEC 62109-2:2024 (safety for power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems) via Directoral Resolution No. 035-2024-INACAL/DN. These Peruvian Technical Standards align with IEC 62109 Part 1 (general requirements) and Part 2 (requirements for inverters). Products placed on the Peruvian market that fall within this scope should demonstrate conformity with these NTP editions. Third-party test reports based on IEC 62109 from accredited bodies are the common evidence route; confirmation of the specific NTP version and local acceptance route should be verified with INACAL or Peruvian customs brokers before shipment.
summary.zh: 秘鲁INACAL通过第035-2024-INACAL/DN号局长令采用了NTP-IEC 62109-1:2024和NTP-IEC 62109-2:2024（光伏发电系统用电力变换器安全标准）。这些秘鲁技术标准与IEC 62109第1部分（通用要求）和第2部分（逆变器专项要求）保持一致。进入秘鲁市场且属于本范围的产品，应证明符合这些NTP版本。来自认可机构的IEC 62109第三方测试报告是常见的证据路径；出货前应与INACAL或秘鲁报关行确认具体NTP版本和当地验收路径。
summary.zht: 秘魯INACAL通過第035-2024-INACAL/DN號局長令採用了NTP-IEC 62109-1:2024和NTP-IEC 62109-2:2024（光伏發電系統用電力變換器安全標準）。這些秘魯技術標準與IEC 62109第1部分（通用要求）和第2部分（逆變器專項要求）保持一致。進入秘魯市場且屬於本範圍的產品，應證明符合這些NTP版本。來自認可機構的IEC 62109第三方測試報告是常見的證據路徑；出貨前應與INACAL或秘魯報關行確認具體NTP版本和當地驗收路徑。

summary.en: China commonly relies on NB/T 32004 (technical requirements for photovoltaic grid-connected inverters) and related standards for domestic market PV inverters. IEC 62109-based test reports are also obtained by Chinese manufacturers for export markets. NB/T 32004 and domestic safety test reports do not substitute for NTP-IEC 62109 conformity confirmation in Peru.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据NB/T 32004（光伏并网逆变器技术规范）及相关标准管理国内市场光伏逆变器。中国制造商也会取得基于IEC 62109的出口市场测试报告。NB/T 32004和国内安全测试报告不能替代秘鲁的NTP-IEC 62109符合性确认。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據NB/T 32004（光伏併網逆變器技術規範）及相關標準管理國內市場光伏逆變器。中國製造商也會取得基於IEC 62109的出口市場測試報告。NB/T 32004和國內安全測試報告不能替代秘魯的NTP-IEC 62109符合性確認。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109 (export test reports from Chinese manufacturers)

gap.en: Confirm that the exported inverter model has a valid IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 test report from an accredited laboratory accepted in Peru. Verify the NTP edition and local acceptance mechanism with INACAL or a Peruvian customs or technical specialist before shipment. A NB/T 32004 report alone is not a substitute.
gap.zh: 确认出口逆变器型号具有秘鲁认可的认可实验室出具的有效IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2测试报告。出货前应与INACAL或秘鲁海关或技术专家确认NTP版本及当地验收机制。仅有NB/T 32004报告不足以替代。
gap.zht: 確認出口逆變器型號具有秘魯認可的認可實驗室出具的有效IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2測試報告。出貨前應與INACAL或秘魯海關或技術專家確認NTP版本及當地驗收機制。僅有NB/T 32004報告不足以替代。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where NTP-IEC 62109 applies to the product; voluntary compliance basis prior to mandatory enforcement if Peru's market surveillance has not yet been activated for this scope — verify current status with INACAL
mandatory_status.cn: NB/T 32004 is a mandatory industry standard for domestic Chinese market; IEC 62109 test reports are voluntarily obtained for export

source.publisher: TÜV Rheinland regulatory tracker (citing INACAL Resolución Directoral No. 035-2024-INACAL/DN)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Obtain IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 test reports from an accredited laboratory before exporting PV inverters to Peru. Confirm the NTP-IEC 62109 edition and local acceptance route with INACAL or a Peruvian specialist.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在向秘鲁出口光伏逆变器前，应从认可实验室取得IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2测试报告。请与INACAL或秘鲁专业人士确认NTP-IEC 62109版本及当地验收路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在向秘魯出口光伏逆變器前，應從認可實驗室取得IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2測試報告。請與INACAL或秘魯專業人士確認NTP-IEC 62109版本及當地驗收路徑。

requirement_topic.en: EMC and Electrical Safety Evidence for Peru Market
requirement_topic.zh: 秘鲁市场电磁兼容和电气安全证据
requirement_topic.zht: 秘魯市場電磁相容和電氣安全證據

summary.en: Beyond inverter-specific safety, PV inverters imported into Peru should carry IEC-based electrical safety and EMC test evidence relevant to the product category. Peru does not operate a CE-type mandatory marking system for these products, but INACAL NTP adoption of IEC safety standards means test evidence from IEC 62109, IEC 61000-series EMC, and applicable IEC protection-class standards is the practical baseline for customs and buyer due diligence. Peruvian customs may require technical documentation at importation; the specific documentation set should be confirmed with an import specialist.
summary.zh: 除逆变器专项安全外，进口秘鲁的光伏逆变器还应提供与产品类别相关的基于IEC的电气安全和EMC测试证据。秘鲁对这类产品不实施CE类型强制标志体系，但INACAL对IEC安全标准的采用意味着来自IEC 62109、IEC 61000系列EMC及适用IEC防护等级标准的测试证据是海关和买方尽调的实际基准。秘鲁海关在进口时可能要求技术文件；具体文件清单应与进口专业人士确认。
summary.zht: 除逆變器專項安全外，進口秘魯的光伏逆變器還應提供與產品類別相關的基於IEC的電氣安全和EMC測試證據。秘魯對這類產品不實施CE類型強制標誌體系，但INACAL對IEC安全標準的採用意味著來自IEC 62109、IEC 61000系列EMC及適用IEC防護等級標準的測試證據是海關和買方盡調的實際基準。秘魯海關在進口時可能要求技術文件；具體文件清單應與進口專業人士確認。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1, IEC 62109-2 (adopted as NTP in Peru)
IEC 61000 series EMC requirements as referenced in applicable NTP

summary.en: Chinese inverter manufacturers commonly hold IEC 62109 and CE-based EMC test reports for export models. These export reports are more relevant to Peru than domestic GB standards, but the specific Peru NTP acceptance route and customs documentation requirements should be confirmed locally.
summary.zh: 中国逆变器制造商通常为出口型号持有IEC 62109和基于CE的EMC测试报告。这些出口报告比国内GB标准更与秘鲁市场相关，但秘鲁NTP具体验收路径和海关文件要求应在当地确认。
summary.zht: 中國逆變器製造商通常為出口型號持有IEC 62109和基於CE的EMC測試報告。這些出口報告比國內GB標準更與秘魯市場相關，但秘魯NTP具體驗收路徑和海關文件要求應在當地確認。

gap.en: Prepare IEC-based safety and EMC test evidence for the exported inverter model and confirm the import documentation set with a Peruvian customs specialist before shipment.
gap.zh: 为出口逆变器型号准备基于IEC的安全和EMC测试证据，并在出货前与秘鲁海关专业人士确认进口文件清单。
gap.zht: 為出口逆變器型號準備基於IEC的安全和EMC測試證據，並在出貨前與秘魯海關專業人士確認進口文件清單。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where NTP safety standards require conformity evidence; customs documentation requirements are mandatory at import
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic GB EMC evidence does not satisfy Peru NTP-IEC or customs requirements

source.publisher: Instituto Nacional de Calidad (INACAL), Plataforma del Estado Peruano

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Prepare IEC-based electrical safety and EMC test documentation for export inverters. Confirm Peru import documentation and NTP acceptance requirements with local specialists before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 为出口逆变器准备基于IEC的电气安全和EMC测试文件。出货前与当地专业人士确认秘鲁进口文件及NTP验收要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 為出口逆變器準備基於IEC的電氣安全和EMC測試文件。出貨前與當地專業人士確認秘魯進口文件及NTP驗收要求。
